message:
fix(web,http): request-scoped Cx in async handlers + RFC 9110 identity encoding

handler.rs: Replace Cx::for_testing() with request_cx() helper that
extracts live Cx from request extensions or thread-local context,
failing closed with 500 if unavailable. Simplifies run_async_handler
to use futures_lite::block_on with panic isolation. Adds regression
tests for request-scoped Cx injection and cancel-aware handlers.

compress.rs: Fix negotiate_encoding() to preserve identity's RFC 9110
§12.5.3 default q=1.0 when a non-zero wildcard is present. Previously
*;q=0.5 incorrectly lowered identity from 1.0 to 0.5. Adds regression
tests for wildcard-only and explicit-identity scenarios.

Closes beads 1qfd0.335 and 1qfd0.332.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
